---
title: "Bilingual Assholes: Ratings Graphs"
author: "morgan moyer"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(multcomp) # not available for this version of R
library(stringr)
library(textstem)
library(sciplot)
library(tidyverse)
theme_set(theme_bw())
cbPalette <- c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00", "#009E73","#999999", "#E69F00")
vaPalette <- c("#FCC6BB", "#F54927", "#9C2007", "#440E03")
gPal <- c("#B9E615","#5E15E6","#F78D02", "#009E73")

# scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette)
# valPal <- c("#F4320B")

this.dir <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(this.dir)
source("../helpers.R")

d <- read.csv("../data/processed_rating.csv")

names(d)
View(d)
```


## Summary Stats
```{r}
agr <- d %>% 
  group_by(Word) %>% 
  summarize(MeanValence = mean(likert_valence),
            SD = sd(likert_valence),
            MeanArousal = mean(likert_arousal),
            SD = sd(likert_arousal))
print(agr)

```

```{r}

agr <- d %>% 
  group_by(Word,Language) %>% 
  summarize(MeanValence = mean(likert_valence),
            SD = sd(likert_valence),
            MeanArousal = mean(likert_arousal),
            SD = sd(likert_arousal))
  
# dev.off()  # Close all devices
ggplot(agr, aes(x = MeanArousal, y = MeanValence, 
                   color = Language, 
                   # size = MeanArousal,
                   alpha = MeanArousal)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = Word), 
                  max.overlaps = Inf,
                  box.padding = 0.3,
                  point.padding = 0.3) +
  # facet_wrap(~Language) +
  # scale_color_gradient2(low = "red", mid = "white", high = "blue",
                        # midpoint = 5, limits = c(1,9)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1, 9)) +
  # scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.4, 1), guide = "none") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Likert Arousal", y = "Likert Valence",
       title = "Word Valence vs Arousal Ratings",
       color = "Valence", size = "Arousal")

```
